title: pteris sagittifolia var. hastata
intro: Pteris sagittifolia var. hastata, also known as the lance-leaf fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is native to various parts of the world, including China and India, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The lance-leaf fern has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion, made by steeping the leaves in hot water, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
